auth.loginSubtitle: Log in to see your opportunities.
auth.registerSubtitle: Buy low, earn dividends, sell high.
auth.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

landing.heroTitle: Buy low. Earn dividends. Sell high — automatically.
landing.heroSubtitle: Dipzee turns four numbers into one clear Opportunity Score so you know what to buy, hold or sell in seconds.
landing.emailPrivacy: No credit card required. Cancel anytime.
landing.howStep1Desc: Type any ticker or company name from the TSX or US markets.
landing.howStep2Desc: A transparent 0–100 score combines price position, upside and dividend.
landing.howStep3Desc: Build watchlists and get notified when a stock enters the buy zone.
landing.scoreExplainerDesc: The Opportunity Score blends how close the price is to its 52-week low (45%), the upside to analyst targets (35%) and the dividend yield (20%).
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need to invest with clarity
landing.feature1Desc: A transparent 0–100 signal with Buy / Hold / Sell.
landing.feature2Desc: Buy zone, target reached, price and score thresholds.
landing.feature3Desc: Track your stocks, sorted by opportunity.
landing.feature4Desc: Spot income stocks yielding 4% or more.
landing.faq1A: No. Dipzee provides educational information and automated signals, not personalized financial advice.
landing.faq2Q: Where does the data come from?
landing.faq2A: Prices, 52-week ranges, analyst targets and dividends are sourced from market data providers.
landing.faq3A: Canadian (TSX) and US stocks today, with more markets coming soon.
landing.faq4A: Yes, you can cancel or change your plan at any time.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Free forever for up to 10 stocks. Upgrade anytime.
landing.disclaimer: Dipzee provides educational information and automated signals, not personalized financial advice. Not a registered investment adviser. Do your own research.

dashboard.title: Opportunities today
dashboard.subtitle: Your watchlist, sorted by Opportunity Score.
dashboard.emptyDesc: Search for a stock to see its Opportunity Score and add it here.
dashboard.noMatch: No stocks match the selected filters.

asset.notFound: No data available for this ticker.

alerts.title: Alerts
alerts.subtitle: Get notified when conditions are met.
alerts.noneDesc: Create an alert from any stock page or here.
alerts.limitReached: Free plan allows 3 active alerts. Upgrade for unlimited alerts.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your language, currency and alert preferences.
settings.languageDesc: The language used across the app.
settings.currencyDesc: Used for billing and number formatting.
settings.alertEmailDesc: Receive an email when an alert triggers.
settings.alertInAppDesc: Show alerts in your notification inbox.

plans.upgradeSubtitle: Unlock unlimited watchlists, alerts and all languages.
plans.comingSoon: Billing is being set up. Please check back soon.
